title: IoT Environmental Monitor
description: A complete IoT solution with custom sensors, microcontroller firmware, cloud data pipeline, and a real-time React dashboard for environmental monitoring.

title: Vishnushakti Foundation Website
description: A clean and fully responsive website developed as per client requirements, featuring a custom backend with an admin panel for managing content and data. Includes email integration and secure payment gateway services for seamless communication and online transactions.

title: 3D Printed Robotics Kit
description: An open-source robotics platform combining custom 3D-printed components (FDM/SLA) with Arduino-based control systems and a companion mobile app.

title: Smart Home Controller
description: Custom PCB design with integrated microcontroller for home automation. Features touch UI, sensor array, and wireless connectivity with a web-based control panel.

title: Portfolio UI Kit
description: A comprehensive UI component library designed in Figma and implemented in React, featuring 50+ accessible components with dark mode support.

title: Wearable Health Tracker
description: A compact wearable device prototype with custom 3D-printed enclosure, biometric sensors, BLE connectivity, and companion mobile data visualization.
